debug_info.goal:
X : Type u_1
inst✝³ : MeasurableSpace X
inst✝² : TopologicalSpace X
inst✝¹ : LocallyCompactSpace X
inst✝ : T2Space X
μ : ComplexMeasure X
h : ∀ (f : ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap X ℂ), μ.integral ⇑f = 0
⊢ μ = 0

failed_attempts:
apply ComplexMeasure.ext
  intro s hs
  have h₁ : ∀ f : C₀(X, ℂ), ∫ x, f x ∂μ = 0 := fun f => h f
  have h₂ : μ.totalVariation = 0 := by
    have h₃ : ∀ f : C₀(X, ℝ), ∫ x, f x ∂μ.toSignedMeasure.re = 0 := by
      intro f
      have hf : C₀(X, ℂ) := ⟨f, ContinuousMap.comp continuous_ofReal f.continuous, ?_⟩
      · exact fun ε εpos => f.tendsto_zero ε εpos
      simp_all [ComplexMeasure.integral_re]
    have h₄ : ∀ f : C₀(X, ℝ), ∫ x, f x ∂μ.toSignedMeasure.im = 0 := by
      intro f
      have hf : C₀(X, ℂ) := ⟨fun x => I * f x, ContinuousMap.comp continuous_mul_right f.continuous, ?_⟩
      · exact fun ε εpos => by simpa using f.tendsto_zero ε εpos
      simp_all [ComplexMeasure.integral_im]
    have h₅ : μ.toSignedMeasure.re = 0 := SignedMeasure.eq_zero_of_integral_eq_zero h₃
    have h₆ : μ.toSignedMeasure.im = 0 := SignedMeasure.eq_zero_of_integral_eq_zero h₄
    rw [ComplexMeasure.totalVariation_eq_zero_iff]
    simp_all
  have h₇ : μ.totalVariation s = 0 := h₂ ▸ Measure.empty_apply _
  exact ComplexMeasure.absolutelyContinuous_totalVariation.1 (by simp_all) hs

apply ComplexMeasure.ext
  intro s hs
  have h₁ : ∀ f : C₀(X, ℂ), ∫ x, f x ∂μ = 0 := fun f => h f
  have h₂ : ∀ f : C₀(X, ℝ), ∫ x, f x ∂μ.re = 0 := by
    intro f
    have hf : C₀(X, ℂ) := ⟨f, ContinuousMap.comp continuous_ofReal f.continuous⟩
    simp_all [ComplexMeasure.integral_re]
  have h₃ : ∀ f : C₀(X, ℝ), ∫ x, f x ∂μ.im = 0 := by
    intro f
    have hf : C₀(X, ℂ) := ⟨fun x => I * f x, ContinuousMap.mul continuous_const f.continuous⟩
    simp_all [ComplexMeasure.integral_im]
  have h₄ : μ.re = 0 := RealRMK.eq_zero_of_integral_eq_zero h₂
  have h₅ : μ.im = 0 := RealRMK.eq_zero_of_integral_eq_zero h₃
  simp_all

have h₁ : ∀ f : C₀(X, ℝ), μ.integral (f.castToComplex) = 0 := by
    intro f
    specialize h (f.castToComplex)
    simpa using h
  have h₂ : ∀ f : C₀(X, ℝ), (μ.re).integral f = 0 := by
    intro f
    rw [← ComplexMeasure.integral_re]
    simpa using h₁ f
  have h₃ : ∀ f : C₀(X, ℝ), (μ.im).integral f = 0 := by
    intro f
    rw [← ComplexMeasure.integral_im]
    simpa using h₁ f
  have h₄ : μ.re = 0 := RealRMK.eq_zero_of_integral_eq_zero h₂
  have h₅ : μ.im = 0 := RealRMK.eq_zero_of_integral_eq_zero h₃
  ext1
  simp [h₄, h₅]

apply ComplexMeasure.ext
  intro s hs
  have h₁ : ∀ f : C₀(X, ℂ), ∫ x, f x ∂μ = 0 := fun f => h f
  have h₂ : μ.totalVariation = 0 := by
    have h₃ : ∀ f : C₀(X, ℝ), ∫ x, f x ∂μ.toSignedMeasure.re = 0 := by
      intro f
      have hf : C₀(X, ℂ) := ⟨f, ContinuousMap.comp continuous_ofReal f.continuous, by simp⟩
      simpa using h₁ hf
    have h₄ : ∀ f : C₀(X, ℝ), ∫ x, f x ∂μ.toSignedMeasure.im = 0 := by
      intro f
      have hf : C₀(X, ℂ) := ⟨fun x => I * f x, by continuity, by simp⟩
      simpa using h₁ hf
    have h₅ : μ.toSignedMeasure.re = 0 := by
      apply MeasureTheory.SignedMeasure.eq_zero_of_integral_eq_zero
      exact h₃
    have h₆ : μ.toSignedMeasure.im = 0 := by
      apply MeasureTheory.SignedMeasure.eq_zero_of_integral_eq_zero
      exact h₄
    rw [ComplexMeasure.totalVariation_eq_zero_iff]
    constructor <;> simp_all
  have h₇ : μ.totalVariation s = 0 := h₂ ▸ MeasureTheory.Measure.zero_apply s
  exact ComplexMeasure.absolutelyContinuous_totalVariation.1 (by simp_all) ▸ ENNReal.toReal_eq_zero.1 h₇

have h₁ : ∀ f : C₀(X, ℝ), μ.integral (f.castToComplex) = 0 := by

    apply MeasureTheory.SignedMeasure.eq_zero_of_integral_eq_zero
    intro f hf
    simp_all [ComplexMeasure.integral_im]
  ext
  simp_all [ComplexMeasure.ext_iff]

him

apply ComplexMeasure.ext
  intro s hs
  have h₁ : ∀ f : C₀(X, ℂ), ∫ x, f x ∂μ = 0 := fun f => h f
  have h₂ : μ.toSignedMeasure.re = 0 := by
    apply MeasureTheory.SignedMeasure.eq_zero_of_integral_eq_zero
    · exact inferInstance
    · intro f hf
      specialize h₁ (ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ofReal f)
      simp_all [ComplexMeasure.integral_ofReal]
  have h₃ : μ.toSignedMeasure.im = 0 := by
    apply MeasureTheory.SignedMeasure.eq_zero_of_integral_eq_zero
    · exact inferInstance
    · intro f hf
      specialize h₁ (ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ofReal' f)
      simp_all [ComplexMeasure.integral_ofReal']
  simp_all [ComplexMeasure.ext_iff]

  have h₂ : μ.toSignedMeasure.re = 0 := by
    apply MeasureTheory.SignedMeasure.eq_zero_of_integral_eq_zero
    · exact inferInstance
    · intro f hf
      simp_all [ComplexMeasure.integral_re]
  have h₃ : μ.toSignedMeasure.im = 0 := by
    apply MeasureTheory.SignedMeasure.eq_zero_of_integral_eq_zero
    · exact inferInstance

      simp_all [ComplexMeasure.integral_im]

apply ComplexMeasure.ext
  intro s hs
  have h₁ : μ.totalVariation = 0 := by
    have h₂ : ∀ f : C₀(X, ℂ), ∫ x, f x ∂μ = 0 := by
      intro f
      exact h f
    have h₃ : μ.totalVariation = 0 := by
      apply MeasureTheory.Measure.ext
      intro E hE
      have h₄ : ∫⁻ x in E, (1 : ENNReal) ∂μ.totalVariation = 0 := by
        -- Use density of C₀ in L¹(μ.totalVariation) and the fact that integral of all C₀ functions is zero
        -- This implies total variation measure is zero
        exact MeasureTheory.Measure.absolutelyContinuous.of_integral_zero h₂ E hE
      simpa using h₄
    exact h₃
  simp_all
